name: 函数基础
subject: math
domain_name: 代数 I / Algebra I / Algebra I
curriculum_points: HSF-IF.A.1 Understand that a function from one set (called the domain) to another set (called the range) assigns to each element of the domain exactly one element of the range. If f is a function and x is an element of its domain, then f(x) denotes the output of f corresponding to the input x. The graph of f is the graph of the equation y = f(x).
HSF-IF.A.2 Use function notation, evaluate functions for inputs in their domains, and interpret statements that use function notation in terms of a context.

HSF-IF.A.3 Recognize that sequences are functions, sometimes defined recursively, whose domain is a subset of the integers. For example, the Fibonacci sequence is defined recursively by f(0) = f(1) = 1, f(n+1) = f(n) + f(n-1) for n ≥ 1.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「函数基础」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HSF-IF.A.1 Understand that a function from one set (called the domain) to another set (called the range) assigns to each…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HSF-IF.A.2 Use function notation, evaluate functions for inputs in their domains… 对理解「函数基础」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
